title: Ethics in Practice
catalogDescription: Culmination of the ethics minor. Synthesizes training in ethics with primary discipline. Includes a project of positive social engagement (service learning or research project with fieldwork). Limited to undergraduates completing the minor in ethics. Credit/no-credit only.
